description:
## Goal

Move the per-feed concurrent fetch logic (spawning, timeout, fallback) out of `src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` into a dedicated `src/fetcher/feed_fetcher_concurrent.cr`. This separates the "what to fetch" strategy (`feed_fetcher.cr`) from the "how to fetch concurrently" mechanism.

## Source: src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr (current location)

Move:
- `fetch_single_feed_in_background(feed, config, previous_feed_data, channel, index)` (~lines 192-225)
- `fetch_single_feed_with_timeout(feed, config, previous_feed_data, index)` (~lines 227-272)
- `fetch_feeds_concurrently(all_configs, existing_data, config)` (~lines 274-318)
- `best_available_feed(feed, fetched, existing)` helper (~lines 145-150)
- `fallback_feed(feed, previous, error_message, context)` helper (~lines 156-163)

## Target: src/fetcher/feed_fetcher_concurrent.cr

Design:

```crystal
module RefreshLoop::FeedFetcherConcurrent
  def self.fetch_all(
    all_configs : Hash(String, Feed),
    existing_data : Hash(String, FeedData),
    config : Config,
    semaphore : SemaphorePool,
  ) : Hash(String, FeedData)
    # spawns per-feed fibers, waits up to OVERALL_TIMEOUT
  end

  def self.fetch_one(feed, config, previous, semaphore) : FeedData
    # fetch_single_feed_in_background + fetch_single_feed_with_timeout
  end

  def self.best_available_feed(...) : FeedData
  end

  def self.fallback_feed(...) : FeedData
  end
end
```

Take the `SemaphorePool` instance as a parameter (no module-level state).

## Acceptance

- `src/fetcher/feed_fetcher_concurrent.cr` exists with the moved code.
- `src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` no longer contains these five methods.
- The signatures stay backward-compatible at the call sites — `refresh_all` still calls a single function that returns `Hash(String, FeedData)`.
- `RefreshHealthMonitor.feed_fetch_started` / `feed_fetch_completed` calls remain.
- `just nix-build` succeeds.
- `nix develop . --command crystal spec` passes.

## Notes

- The 10-minute overall timeout, `Fiber.yield` between spawns, and channel-close patterns are part of the behavior contract — preserve them.
- `fetch_single_feed_in_background` uses a buffered result channel (size 1) — preserve this to avoid fiber leaks.
- The `:unchecked` mutex on `init_mutex` is moved to `semaphore_pool.cr` (separate ticket) — do not duplicate.
title: Extract per-feed concurrent fetch into src/fetcher/feed_fetcher_concurrent.cr
